input: We have 12 support tickets complaining about our onboarding. Analyze and synthesize.
rubric: Extracts pain points from tickets with verbatim quotes
Provides implications for messaging or product

input: Build a persona for our ideal customer based on 8 interview transcripts
rubric: Persona has minimum 5 data points from consistent segment
Includes profile, JTBD, triggers, pains, outcomes, objections
Includes vocabulary section with exact customer phrases
No invented details (fields left blank if no data)
Based on actual quotes, not assumptions
